headline: Realty Income Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced it will release its first quarter 2026 operating results after the New York Stock Exchange closes on May 6, 2026. Following publication of this earnings release, the company will host its quarterly investor call at 2:00 p.m. PDT.
